# TechMate4u

> We engineer highly interactive, conversion-optimized websites and AI-integrated digital systems that accelerate business growth.

## About Us
TechMate4u is a premium digital product studio and web engineering agency. We specialize in building next-generation digital systems, high-performance websites, custom ERP solutions, and modern restaurant POS systems. We focus on modern tech stacks, fast delivery, and startup-friendly models.

## Core Services
- **Web Development**: High-performance, SEO-optimized frontends (Next.js, React).
- **AI Automation & Integration**: Intelligent systems for business workflows.
- **Custom ERP Software**: Enterprise management platforms designed to streamline operations.
- **Restaurant Management & POS**: Modern systems for table handling, billing, and kitchen coordination.
- **E-commerce Solutions**: Scalable architectures for online retail.

## Key Projects
- **Amara**: Custom Client Showcase
- **Riwaaz Ethnic**: Premium ethnic wear e-commerce platform
- **Lab2Door**: Healthcare logistics and medical service platform
- **Restaurant Management**: Custom Hospitality & POS System

## Contact & Links
- Website: https://techmate4u.com
- Contact: https://techmate4u.com/#contact
